audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds: transactions are validated against MAX_TX_GAS_LIMIT_OSAKA (16777216) at two enforcement points: (1) transaction pool validation rejects txs exceeding limit when Osaka fork is active (eth.rs:491-498), (2) block validation checks all transactions in received blocks (validation.rs:159-170). All entry points (P2P, RPC, block import) pass through at least one of these checks.
